scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm --workspace frontend run build && python3 -m compileall backend/app
scripts.lint: npm --workspace frontend run lint && npm run lint:backend
scripts.format: npm --workspace frontend run format && npm run format:backend
scripts.format:check: npm --workspace frontend run format:check && npm run format:check:backend
